q: __________ did you pass the test? – I practiced a lot.
How __________ did James play the game? – For about two hours.
How __________ people are there in your family? – There are five.
How __________ is your brother? – He is ten years old.
How __________ do you go to the library? – Twice a week.
How __________ milk do we need? – Just one bottle.
__________ did the movie start? – At 7 p.m.
__________ is your birthday? – It’s in July.
__________ do you usually study after school? – At the library.
How __________ is the movie? – It’s about two hours.
How __________ students are in your class? – Thirty.
How __________ water do you drink every day? – About two liters.
__________ did he feel when he heard the news? – Very happy.
How __________ is that building? – About 100 meters.
How __________ do you watch TV? – Almost every day.
How __________ homework do you have today? – Just a little.
__________ did she travel to Busan? – By train.
